Bash(python3 preflight.py -v -m claude-opus-4-6 "Build a Python backtesting system for a crypto momentum strategy trading top-20 coins on daily Binance OHLCV data \(2018-present\). Two signals: 10/20-day EMA crossover and 14-day momentum Z-score. Walk-forward analysis \(180-day formation, 30-day trading windows\). Volatility-scaled position sizing \(1-2% risk, max 5 concurrent\). Modular architecture: data fetcher, signals, portfolio, engine, reporting. Comprehensive tests with pytest and hypothesis \(85% coverage target\). CLI entry point with HTML tearsheet generation.")
